android.title: Android Capability Notes
android.body: This build ships the Android shell, LAN auto-discovery, basic pairing, and diagnostics export. QR pairing, the real upload queue, background reconnection, and incremental sync have not yet been ported to the Android native engine.

myDevice.label: My Device Name
myDevice.hint: This name will be shown on your PC.
myDevice.lockedHint: A transfer is in progress, device name can't be changed right now.

photoPermission.title: Photo Access Is Off
photoPermission.body: Allow access to Photos to keep auto-sync running.

confirm.title: Upload diagnostics
confirm.message: Briefly describe the issue you ran into (e.g. upload stuck, shared folder not loading). We'll bundle current runtime state along with your note and send it to the Vivi Drop support team.

failure.toast: Upload failed, please try again later

tooLarge.toast: Diagnostic bundle too large, please contact support

switchDeviceWhileUploading.title: Upload in Progress
switchDeviceWhileUploading.body: An upload is currently running. Switching devices will interrupt it. Continue?

resetSync.title: Reset All Sync State
resetSync.body: This clears all sync records and disconnects the current device. You will need to re-enter a pairing code. Photos on your phone and Mac will not be deleted.

logout.title: Log Out
logout.body: Are you sure you want to log out?

exportUnavailable.title: Cannot Export
exportUnavailable.body: This build does not support exporting the diagnostics bundle.

exportFailed.title: Export Failed
exportFailed.body: Failed to export the diagnostics bundle. Please try again later.

languageSaveFailed.title: Cannot Change Language
languageSaveFailed.body: Failed to save the language setting. Please try again later.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.body: This permanently deletes your account, every sign-in method, and all usage history. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmAgainBody: This is your final confirmation. Deleted data cannot be recovered.
